heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 390h–15 Authorization of appropriations
text: There is authorized to be appropriated for fiscal years beginning after , $4,000,000 to carry out the study authorized by .September 30, 1992section 390h–14 of this title
notes: Amendments1996—, made technical amendment to reference in original act which appears in text as reference to .Pub. L. 104–266, § 2(b)(3)section 390h–14 of this title
